description_long: This object is a modern cash register with a predominantly black, boxy exterior and a central raised section housing a display screen. The front features a recessed area likely for customer interaction, with a visible screen that appears to be an LCD or similar flat-panel type. The sides are solid and angular, with metallic highlights suggesting a robust, possibly metal-plastic construction. The back is mostly featureless, emphasizing the utilitarian design, while the top surface is flat and may support additional items or peripherals. The overall appearance is sleek and functional, suitable for use in retail or service environments.
description: A sleek, black cash register with a central display screen and metallic highlights, designed for modern retail use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed interaction area and the prominent display screen at the center.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the angular, solid construction and the protruding display screen.
description_view_2: Rear view with a mostly featureless, solid black surface and a small raised section at the top.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, highlighting the boxy shape and metallic accents.
